parameters.query:
SELECT
  s.id AS session_id,
  s.scheduled_at,
  s.type AS session_type,
  c.id AS contact_id,
  c.first_name,
  c.last_name,
  c.email
FROM sessions s
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = s.contact_id
WHERE s.tenant_id = 1
  AND s.coach_id = 1
  AND s.status = 'scheduled'
  AND s.scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' > NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' + INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND s.scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' <= NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' + INTERVAL '2 hours'

INSERT INTO interactions (tenant_id, contact_id, session_id, direction, channel, subject, body, workflow_id)
VALUES (1, {{ $('Build Reminder Email').item.json.contact_id }}, {{ $('Build Reminder Email').item.json.session_id }}, 'outbound', 'email', 'Session Reminder — 2 Hours', 'Automated 2-hour reminder email sent', 'WF4')
